title: Goodbye Sora. You were fun for that one week that everyone was talking about you, before getting bored and moving onto other things.

content.summary: Goodbye Sora. You were fun for that one week that everyone was talking about you, before getting bored and moving onto other things. Sora (@soraofficialapp) We’re saying goodbye to Sora. To everyone who created with Sora, shared it, and built community around it: thank you. What you made with Sora mattered, and we know this news is disappointing. We’ll share more soon, including timelines for the app and API and details on preserving your work. – The Sora Team — https://nitter.net/soraofficialapp/status/2036532795984715896#m
